description_blurb:
This document is email correspondence describing the content of a mission report and requesting clarification on its content.
All descriptive and estimative language contained in this report reflects the reporter’s subjective interpretation at the time of the event. Such characterizations should not be interpreted as a conclusive indication of the presence or absence of any intrinsic object features or performance characteristics.
title: DOW-UAP-D52, Email Correspondance, NA, August 2024
summary: This document is email correspondence describing the content of a mission report and requesting clarification on its content, specifically the approval to include the year of the incident in an unclassified tear line. The incident involved a U.S. Aircraft observing a possible UAP for over 2 hours.
reported_behavior: likely moving at a low speed
bust_reasoning: The document describes a single-sensor (visual) observation of an 'oval/orb shaped' object 'likely moving at a low speed' for 'over 2 hours'. While the duration is notable, the description lacks any anomalous kinematics or multi-sensor corroboration. These characteristics are consistent with several mundane explanations, particularly a high-altitude balloon or a distant, slow-moving aircraft/drone, which would not resist such observations.
full_text:
# DOW-UAP-D52, Email Correspondance, NA, August 2024 - Page 1

(b) (6)

CLASSIFICATION: ~~SECRET//NOFORN~~
Good morning,

Below is the requested additional information (include the year) to the
UNCLASS tear line.

Let us know if you have any questions, comments or concerns.

v/r
(b) (6)

PAROC Intel Data Analysis Technician

15 AF / DET 1

(b) (6)

//UNCLASSIFIED//

31 OCT 24, U.S Aircraft observed a possible UAP. It appeared to be oval/orb

1



# DOW-UAP-D52, Email Correspondance, NA, August 2024 - Page 2

shaped, likely moving at a low speed. The U.S Aircraft had eyes on the poss
UAP for over 2 hours.

//UNCLASSIFIED//

[redacted]
(b) (6)

CLASSIFICATION: ~~SECRET//NOFORN~~

Hello,

Could you please approve the use of the year this incident took place?
Currently you have approved the month and the day, we request it includes
the year.

Thank for your assistance.

V/r
[redacted]
(b) (6)

Information Disclosure Analyst

2
cover_up_reasoning: The document is an email exchange primarily focused on approving the inclusion of the incident's year in an 'UNCLASS tear line,' indicating a process of making information more transparent rather than concealing it. The 'SECRET//NOFORN' classification on the email itself, while the incident description is marked '//UNCLASSIFIED//', is standard for classified systems handling unclassified data. The only redactions are routine (b)(6) and [redacted] for personal identifiers.
title_zh: DOW-UAP-D52，电子邮件通信，不适用，2024年8月
summary_zh: 本文件为电子邮件通信，描述一份任务报告的内容，并请求对其内容进行澄清，特别是关于批准将事件年份纳入非密级摘要行的请求。该事件涉及一架美国飞机对一个可能的UAP进行了超过2小时的观察。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件描述了对一个物体的单传感器（视觉）观察，该物体呈“椭圆形/球形”，可能“以低速移动”，持续“超过2小时”。尽管观察持续时间值得注意，但描述中缺乏任何异常运动学特征或多传感器佐证。这些特征与几种常见解释相符，特别是高空 H气球或远距离、低速移动的飞机/无人机，此类物体不会抵制此类观察。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件是一份电子邮件往来，主要关注批准将事件年份纳入“非密级摘要行”，这表明这是一个使信息更加透明而非隐瞒的过程。电子邮件本身的“SECRET//NOFORN”密级，而事件描述标记为“//UNCLASSIFIED//”，这对于处理非密级数据的涉密系统而言是标准做法。唯一的删节是出于个人身份识别信息的常规(b)(6)和[已删节]处理。
claims: U.S Aircraft observed a possible UAP
UAP was likely moving at a low speed
U.S Aircraft had eyes on the UAP for over 2 hours
claims_zh: 美国飞机观察到一个可能的UAP
美国飞机对该UAP进行了超过2小时的观察
bust_explanations: High-altitude balloon (weather, surveillance, or hobby) fits the 'oval/orb shaped' description, 'low speed' movement, and the 'over 2 hours' duration of observation.
A distant aircraft or drone could appear as an 'oval/orb' and move at a 'low speed' when observed from a significant distance, potentially for an extended period.
Witness misinterpretation of a known object, given the single visual sensor modality and the generic description of the object and its behavior.
bust_explanations_zh: 高空 H气球（气象、侦察或业余爱好）符合“椭圆形/球形”的描述、“低速”移动以及“超过2小时”的观察持续时间。
远距离的飞机或无人机在远距离观察时可能呈现“椭圆形/球形”并以“低速”移动，并可能持续较长时间。
鉴于单一视觉传感器模式以及对物体及其行为的通用描述，可能是目击者对已知物体的误判。
cover_up_indicators: Email explicitly discusses approving the release of the incident year to an 'UNCLASS tear line', indicating a move towards transparency
cover_up_indicators_zh: 出于个人身份识别信息的常规(b)(6)删节
出于个人身份识别信息的常规[已删节]处理
电子邮件明确讨论了批准将事件年份发布到“非密级摘要行”，表明这是迈向透明化的一步
